steps.installApp: Install the Smart Banka app and open it
steps.selectScanQr: On the home screen, tap Scan QR code in the top left corner
steps.enterCode: Scan or type the activation code shown above into the child's device

steps.label: Follow the instructions and scan both documents one by one.

twoDocumentsPairing.goToBranchTitle: Let's sort it out at a branch
twoDocumentsPairing.goToBranchSubtitle: Have any questions? Give us a call or visit your nearest branch.

otherDevicePairing.title: Prepare your original device and follow the instructions

steps.label: Go to your original device with Smart Banka and sign in
Open the menu More --> Settings and profile --> Connect a new device
Keep the screen with the QR code with the "pairing" symbol open
On this device, tap the button below and point the camera at the QR code

otherDevicePairing.scanButton: Scan QR code with the "pairing" symbol

meOrFamily.title: For me or my family

getStarted.foreignerNotice:
Don't have Czech citizenship?
We'll be happy to open any of our products for you at any of our branches.

internetBankPairingGuide.loginPageTitle: Go to Internet Banking and click on "Sign in with ID and password"
internetBankPairingGuide.qrScanPageTitle: In Internet Banking, click on "+Connect Smart Bank" in the top menu

loginSteps.label: On your computer, go to the Internet Banking login page ib.moneta.cz.
Switch the login option to "Sign in with ID and password".
Enter your Identification number (ID), password and sign in.
Confirm the login using an SMS code

qrScanSteps.label: In Internet Banking, click on "+Connect Smart Bank" in the top menu.
On this device, click the button below and point your camera at the QR code with the blue "connect" symbol

internetBankPairingGuide.loginConfirmButton: I am signed in to Internet Banking

forgotPassword.title: Zastavte se za námi na pobočce nebo zvolte jiný způsob propojení.
